# Summary

Briefly describe the change and the user-facing impact.

# Validation

- [ ] `python -m pip install -e .[dev]`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pytest`

# Notes

- Mention any follow-up work or repo hygiene changes.
- Call out if the change affects packaging, install steps, or CI expectations.
